entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: A legume crop in northeastern Brazil found to be infected by a previously unreported virus disease

entities.name: BRAZIL
entities.description: The country where groundnut crops were surveyed for virus disease

entities.name: COWPEA APHID-BORNE MOSAIC VIRUS
entities.description: A potyvirus identified as the cause of ring spots and blotches in groundnut and cowpea

entities.name: RING SPOTS AND BLOTCHES
entities.description: Characteristic leaf symptoms caused by the virus in groundnut

entities.name: COWPEA
entities.description: A legume crop susceptible to CABMV and used for virus transmission studies

entities.name: TOXOPTERA CITRICIDUS
entities.description: An aphid species that transmits the virus

entities.name: APHIS GOSSYPII
entities.description: An aphid species that transmits the virus

entities.name: DEGENERATE PRIMERS
entities.description: Molecular tools used to clone and sequence the 3′ terminal region of the viral genome

entities.name: CLONING AND SEQUENCING
entities.description: The process of replicating and determining the nucleotide sequence of the viral genome

entities.name: SEQUENCE ANALYSIS
entities.description: The process of comparing viral sequences to identify the virus

entities.name: COAT PROTEIN
entities.description: A viral protein analyzed to determine the relationship between virus isolates

entities.name: 3′ UNTRANSLATED REGION
entities.description: A non-coding region of the viral genome used for sequence analysis

entities.name: POTYVIRUS
entities.description: The genus of viruses to which CABMV belongs

entities.name: SOUTH AFRICA
entities.description: A country where related CABMV isolates were identified

entities.name: ZIMBABWE
entities.description: A country where related CABMV isolates were identified

entities.name: UNITED STATES
entities.description: A country where related CABMV isolates were identified

entities.name: GENOME ANALYSIS
entities.description: The analysis of the viral genome used to identify the virus as CABMV

entities.name: GERMPLASM EXCHANGE
entities.description: The exchange of genetic resources, which is impacted by the occurrence of CABMV
